---
title: "The Corpus"
subtitle: "BHB, 1470–1800"
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<script>
  window.MARGINS_SUMMARY = fetch("../_data/bhb_pre1800_summary.json").then(r => r.json());
  function placeLabel(s) {
    const parts = (s || "").split("|");
    return parts.find(p => /[A-Za-z]/.test(p)) || parts[0] || "";
  }
</script>

<div class="scope-banner">
  <div class="scope-stat"><div class="n">10,787</div><div class="label">Records</div></div>
  <div class="scope-stat"><div class="n">1470–1800</div><div class="label">Years</div></div>
  <div class="scope-stat"><div class="n">~9,628</div><div class="label">Works (≤)</div></div>
  <div class="scope-stat"><div class="n">205</div><div class="label">Places</div></div>
  <div class="scope-stat"><div class="n">1,986</div><div class="label">Authors</div></div>
  <div class="scope-stat"><div class="n">2,259</div><div class="label">Haskamot</div></div>
  <div class="scope-stat"><div class="n">5,351</div><div class="label">Chronograms</div></div>
  <div class="scope-stat"><div class="n">~18%</div><div class="label">of ~60k target</div></div>
</div>
```

## When

```{=html}
<div class="chart"><div id="c-productivity" style="width:100%; min-height: 340px;"></div></div>
<div class="chart"><div id="c-century" style="width:100%; min-height: 220px;"></div></div>

<script>
window.MARGINS_SUMMARY.then(s => {
  const dec = Object.entries(s.by_decade).map(([d,n]) => ({decade:+d, n}));
  vegaEmbed("#c-productivity", {
    $schema: "https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json",
    width: "container", height: 320,
    title: "Records per decade",
    data: { values: dec },
    mark: { type: "bar", color: "#7c2d12" },
    encoding: {
      x: { field: "decade", type: "ordinal", title: null },
      y: { field: "n", type: "quantitative", title: null },
      tooltip: [{field:"decade"}, {field:"n", title:"Records"}]
    }
  }, {actions:false});

  const cent = Object.entries(s.by_century).map(([c,n]) => ({century:+c+"c.", n}));
  vegaEmbed("#c-century", {
    $schema: "https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json",
    width: "container", height: 180,
    title: "Records per century",
    data: { values: cent },
    mark: { type: "bar", color: "#7c2d12" },
    encoding: {
      x: { field: "n", type: "quantitative", title: null },
      y: { field: "century", type: "nominal", title: null, sort: null },
      tooltip: [{field:"century"}, {field:"n", title:"Records"}]
    }
  }, {actions:false});
});
</script>
```

## Where

```{=html}
<div class="chart"><div id="c-places" style="width:100%; min-height: 360px;"></div></div>
<div class="chart"><div id="c-place-decade" style="width:100%; min-height: 420px;"></div></div>

<script>
window.MARGINS_SUMMARY.then(s => {
  const top12 = s.top_places.slice(0,12).map(([p,n]) => ({place: placeLabel(p), n}));
  vegaEmbed("#c-places", {
    $schema: "https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json",
    width: "container", height: 340,
    title: "Top 12 places of publication",
    data: { values: top12 },
    mark: { type: "bar", color: "#0e7490" },
    encoding: {
      y: { field: "place", type: "nominal", sort: "-x", title: null },
      x: { field: "n", type: "quantitative", title: null },
      tooltip: [{field:"place"}, {field:"n", title:"Records"}]
    }
  }, {actions:false});

  const heat = s.decade_place_top12.map(r => ({decade: r.decade, place: placeLabel(r.place), n: r.n}));
  vegaEmbed("#c-place-decade", {
    $schema: "https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json",
    width: "container", height: 400,
    title: "Decade × place (top 12)",
    data: { values: heat },
    mark: "rect",
    encoding: {
      x: { field: "decade", type: "ordinal", title: null },
      y: { field: "place", type: "nominal", title: null, sort: "-x" },
      color: { field: "n", type: "quantitative", scale: { scheme: "oranges" }, title: "Records" },
      tooltip: [{field:"place"}, {field:"decade"}, {field:"n", title:"Records"}]
    }
  }, {actions:false});
});
</script>
```

## Who

```{=html}
<div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1rem;">
  <div class="chart"><div id="c-authors" style="width:100%; min-height: 360px;"></div></div>
  <div class="chart"><div id="c-works" style="width:100%; min-height: 360px;"></div></div>
</div>

<script>
window.MARGINS_SUMMARY.then(s => {
  const auth = s.top_authors.slice(0,10).map(([a,n]) => ({author:a, n}));
  vegaEmbed("#c-authors", {
    $schema: "https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json",
    width: "container", height: 340,
    title: "Top 10 authors (MARC 100)",
    data: { values: auth },
    mark: { type: "bar", color: "#7c2d12" },
    encoding: {
      y: { field: "author", type: "nominal", sort: "-x", title: null, axis: {labelLimit: 260} },
      x: { field: "n", type: "quantitative", title: null },
      tooltip: [{field:"author"}, {field:"n", title:"Records"}]
    }
  }, {actions:false});

  const works = s.top_works.slice(0,10).map(([w,n]) => ({work:w, n}));
  vegaEmbed("#c-works", {
    $schema: "https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json",
    width: "container", height: 340,
    title: "Top 10 Works (MARC 130 uniform titles)",
    data: { values: works },
    mark: { type: "bar", color: "#0e7490" },
    encoding: {
      y: { field: "work", type: "nominal", sort: "-x", title: null, axis: {labelLimit: 260} },
      x: { field: "n", type: "quantitative", title: null },
      tooltip: [{field:"work"}, {field:"n", title:"Manifestations"}]
    }
  }, {actions:false});
});
</script>
```

## What

```{=html}
<div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 1rem;">
  <div class="chart"><div id="c-langs" style="width:100%; min-height: 320px;"></div></div>
  <div class="chart"><div id="c-types" style="width:100%; min-height: 320px;"></div></div>
  <div class="chart"><div id="c-genres" style="width:100%; min-height: 320px;"></div></div>
</div>

<script>
window.MARGINS_SUMMARY.then(s => {
  const langMap = {heb:"Hebrew", yid:"Yiddish", lad:"Ladino", lat:"Latin", ger:"German",
                   eng:"English", ita:"Italian", ara:"Arabic", arc:"Aramaic",
                   jrb:"Judeo-Arabic", ghb:"Judeo-Arabic (ghb)", spa:"Spanish",
                   fre:"French", pol:"Polish", dut:"Dutch"};
  const langs = s.top_languages.slice(0,8).map(([l,n]) => ({lang: langMap[l] || l, n}));
  vegaEmbed("#c-langs", {
    $schema: "https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json",
    width: "container", height: 300,
    title: "Language (MARC 041)",
    data: { values: langs },
    mark: { type: "bar", color: "#1d4ed8" },
    encoding: {
      y: { field: "lang", type: "nominal", sort: "-x", title: null },
      x: { field: "n", type: "quantitative", title: null },
      tooltip: [{field:"lang"}, {field:"n"}]
    }
  }, {actions:false});

  const types = s.top_types.slice(0,8).map(([t,n]) => ({type:t, n}));
  vegaEmbed("#c-types", {
    $schema: "https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json",
    width: "container", height: 300,
    title: "Type (MARC 901)",
    data: { values: types },
    mark: { type: "bar", color: "#0e7490" },
    encoding: {
      y: { field: "type", type: "nominal", sort: "-x", title: null, axis: {labelLimit: 200} },
      x: { field: "n", type: "quantitative", title: null },
      tooltip: [{field:"type"}, {field:"n"}]
    }
  }, {actions:false});

  const genres = s.top_genres.slice(0,8).map(([g,n]) => ({genre:g, n}));
  vegaEmbed("#c-genres", {
    $schema: "https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json",
    width: "container", height: 300,
    title: "Genre (MARC 690)",
    data: { values: genres },
    mark: { type: "bar", color: "#7c2d12" },
    encoding: {
      y: { field: "genre", type: "nominal", sort: "-x", title: null, axis: {labelLimit: 200} },
      x: { field: "n", type: "quantitative", title: null },
      tooltip: [{field:"genre"}, {field:"n"}]
    }
  }, {actions:false});
});
</script>
```

## Paratext

```{=html}
<div class="chart"><div id="c-paratext-time" style="width:100%; min-height: 340px;"></div></div>
<div class="chart"><div id="c-paratext-pct" style="width:100%; min-height: 280px;"></div></div>

<script>
window.MARGINS_SUMMARY.then(s => {
  const rows = [];
  Object.entries(s.haskama_by_decade).forEach(([d,n]) => rows.push({decade:+d, kind:"Haskama (915)", n}));
  Object.entries(s.chronogram_by_decade).forEach(([d,n]) => rows.push({decade:+d, kind:"Chronogram (912)", n}));
  vegaEmbed("#c-paratext-time", {
    $schema: "https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json",
    width: "container", height: 320,
    title: "Haskamot and chronograms per decade",
    data: { values: rows },
    mark: { type: "line", point: true, strokeWidth: 2 },
    encoding: {
      x: { field: "decade", type: "ordinal", title: null },
      y: { field: "n", type: "quantitative", title: null },
      color: { field: "kind", scale: { range: ["#7c2d12","#0e7490"] }, title: null },
      tooltip: [{field:"decade"}, {field:"kind"}, {field:"n"}]
    }
  }, {actions:false});

  const totals = s.by_century;
  const pct = [];
  Object.entries(s.haskama_by_century).forEach(([c,n]) => pct.push({century:c+"c.", kind:"Haskama (915)", pct: 100*n/totals[c]}));
  Object.entries(s.chronogram_by_century).forEach(([c,n]) => pct.push({century:c+"c.", kind:"Chronogram (912)", pct: 100*n/totals[c]}));
  vegaEmbed("#c-paratext-pct", {
    $schema: "https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json",
    width: "container", height: 260,
    title: "Paratext share of records, by century",
    data: { values: pct },
    mark: { type: "bar" },
    encoding: {
      x: { field: "century", type: "ordinal", title: null },
      xOffset: { field: "kind" },
      y: { field: "pct", type: "quantitative", title: "%", scale: {domain: [0,70]} },
      color: { field: "kind", scale: { range: ["#7c2d12","#0e7490"] }, title: null },
      tooltip: [{field:"century"}, {field:"kind"}, {field:"pct", format:".1f"}]
    }
  }, {actions:false});
});
</script>
```

## Bowers/Gaskell signals in free-text notes

```{=html}
<div class="chart"><div id="c-signals" style="width:100%; min-height: 320px;"></div></div>
<p style="text-align:center; color:#6b7280; font-size:0.85rem;">~908 records (8.4% of in-scope) carry at least one signal in MARC 500. <a href="../methods/bibliographic_units_and_marc.html#what-bowersgaskell-distinctions-look-like-in-bhb-free-text">grammar &amp; examples →</a></p>

<script>
window.MARGINS_SUMMARY.then(s => {
  const labels = {state:"State (in some copies)", variant_copies:"Variant copies exist",
    issue:"Issue (new title page)", cancel:"Cancel leaf",
    impression:"Impression / reprint", replacement:"Replacement",
    variant_text:"Variant text", forged:"Forged imprint",
    omission:"Omission / suppression"};
  const data = Object.entries(s.signals_by_kind).map(([k,n]) => ({kind: labels[k]||k, n}));
  vegaEmbed("#c-signals", {
    $schema: "https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json",
    width: "container", height: 300,
    data: { values: data },
    mark: { type: "bar", color: "#ea580c" },
    encoding: {
      y: { field: "kind", type: "nominal", sort: "-x", title: null, axis: {labelLimit: 240} },
      x: { field: "n", type: "quantitative", title: null },
      tooltip: [{field:"kind"}, {field:"n"}]
    }
  }, {actions:false});
});
</script>
```

## Geography (DiJeSt full-corpus reference)

```{=html}
<iframe class="dijest-iframe"
        src="https://datastudio.google.com/embed/u/0/reporting/73a17dcc-f092-4dec-8c57-58b606862b2d/page/FPCXD"
        height="600"
        allowfullscreen></iframe>
```
